caron_is_mine.max: Caron: "You have already reached the physical limits of this realm. The dimension itself cannot withstand a larger force."
caron_is_mine.cost_info: Caron: "To broaden the Monarch's vessel, more Soul Essence is required."
caron_is_mine.not_enough: Caron: "You lack sufficient essence. Go forth and reap more soul shards."
caron_is_mine.confirm: Caron: "Will you unbind the shackles of souls and reclaim your past glory?"
caron_is_mine.success: Caron: "I can feel it. Your shadow has grown deeper. More of the deceased shall follow you."

caron_is_dead.max: [Void Guide]: "My Lord, this vessel has already reached its zenith. Further expansion is pointless."
caron_is_dead.cost_info: [Void Guide]: "Offer the souls. Growth of the legion cannot be achieved without a price."
caron_is_dead.not_enough: [Void Guide]: "The souls are insufficient. More sacrifices are required, my Lord."
caron_is_dead.confirm: [Void Guide]: "Shall I liberate the vessel? Give the word, and I shall execute it immediately."
caron_is_dead.cancel: [Void Guide]: "Ceasing. Prudence is also the virtue of a monarch."
caron_is_dead.success: [Void Guide]: "The vessel has expanded. Your legion shall grow ever mightier, my Lord."

mix.select_title: Select two skeletons of the same class to mix

caron_is_mine: Caron: "My Lord, I shall teach you how to weave together the fallen of the same origin."
Caron: "By merging two vessels of the same kind, you can ascend them into a higher being."
Caron: "Keep in mind that the power will coalesce around the vessel with the greater vitality."
Caron: "However, the original vessels used in the fusion will perish, so choose with caution."
caron_is_dead: [Void Guide]: "My Lord, I shall impart the method of weaving two souls of the same origin into one."
[Void Guide]: "By merging two identical vessels, you may ascend them into a being of higher rank."
[Void Guide]: "The power shall condense around the vessel possessing the greater vitality."
[Void Guide]: "However, the previous vessels offered as sacrifices shall perish. Bear this in mind."

caron_is_mine.no_materials: Caron: "I see no subordinates of the same kind to fuse. To enhance the legion's quality, a foundation is required."
caron_is_mine.not_enough_selection: Caron: "Two vessels are required. A single soul cannot weave a new life."
caron_is_mine.mismatch: Caron: "The dead of different origins cannot be mingled. Choose those of the same kind."
caron_is_mine.success: Caron: "Exquisite. The essence of death has condensed, forging an even sharper blade."
caron_is_mine.confirm:
Caron: "Shall you offer a new sacrifice to the soul of {{hp}}/{{maxHp}} to transcend into a greater existence?" (Success Rate: {{chance}}%)

※ Upon failure, the offered sacrifice (material) will be eternally destroyed.
caron_is_mine.fail: Caron: "Ah... The balance of souls has faltered. The primary vessel barely remains intact, but the sacrificed minion has crumbled into ash."
caron_is_mine.max_rarity: Caron: "This restless soul has already reached its zenith. Further fusion is meaningless."
caron_is_mine.cancel: Caron: "At times, stability is wiser than a hasty experiment."

caron_is_dead.no_materials: [Void Guide]: "My Lord, I see no subordinates of the same origin to fuse. Without a foundation, the quality of the legion cannot be improved."
caron_is_dead.not_enough_selection: [Void Guide]: "Select two vessels. A single one cannot weave a new life."
caron_is_dead.mismatch: [Void Guide]: "The dead of different origins do not mingle. Choose those of the same kind."
caron_is_dead.confirm:
[Void Guide]: "Shall you offer a new sacrifice to the soul of {{hp}}/{{maxHp}} and attempt ascension? (Success Rate: {{chance}}%)

※ Upon failure, the vessel offered as a sacrifice shall perish."
caron_is_dead.success: [Void Guide]: "Success. The essence of death has condensed, forging an even sharper blade."
caron_is_dead.fail: [Void Guide]: "The balance of souls has faltered. The primary vessel is preserved, but the sacrifice has vanished into ash."
caron_is_dead.max_rarity: [Void Guide]: "This restless soul has already reached its zenith. Further fusion is meaningless."
caron_is_dead.cancel: [Void Guide]: "Ceasing. Prudence is also the virtue of a monarch."

system.result:
[🦴 Fusion Complete]
Scattered remains have intertwined, reforged into {{name}}.

promotion.select_title: Select a skeleton to promote to Knight (HP 200 or more)

caron_is_mine: Caron: "Oho... My Lord, look at this. The density of mana etched into these bones is extraordinary."
Caron: "You have 'discovered' an elite with such resilient vitality (HP) that even death could not break."
Caron: "A vessel of this caliber is more than worthy of being appointed as your 'Knight'."
caron_is_dead: [Void Guide]: "My Lord, look. The density of magic etched upon this one's bones is extraordinary."
[Void Guide]: "You have discovered an elite possessing vitality (HP) that even death could not wither."
[Void Guide]: "A vessel of this caliber is more than worthy to be appointed as a 'Knight' to serve as your blade."

caron_is_mine.confirm: Would you like to appoint {{name}} as a Knight? If there is an existing Knight, their title will be stripped.
caron_is_mine.cancel: Caron: "A keen eye for talent is also a virtue of a monarch."
caron_is_mine.success: Caron: "Congratulations on the birth of a new Knight. Your shadow has grown even more solid."

caron_is_dead.confirm: [Void Guide]: "Shall you appoint {{name}} as your Knight? If a new Knight is named, the current one shall be stripped of their title and cast aside. Do you consent?"
caron_is_dead.cancel: [Void Guide]: "Ceasing. A monarch's eye must always remain prudent."
caron_is_dead.success: [Void Guide]: "Congratulations. A new blade has been forged to guard your shadow, my Lord."

system.result:
[⚔️ Knight Promotion Complete]
New Knight of the Legion: {{name}}

manage.intro_mine: Caron: "(Whispering from the shadows) I shall open the dimensional rift. Leave your forces in my care."
manage.intro_dead: [ The rift of the usurped subspace twists, emitting an unnatural chill. ]
manage.no_unit: (There are no skeletons in the subspace or on the field to manage.)
manage.push_select: Which summon will you send to the subspace?
manage.pull_select: Select a summon to release from the subspace.
manage.swap_warn: ⚠️ Field capacity is full. You must swap with another unit.
manage.swap_select: Select a unit to send to the subspace instead of [{{name}}].
manage.msg_push: ✨ [Seal] {{name}} has vanished into the dimensional rift.
manage.msg_swap: 🔄 [Swap] The positions of {{name}} have been interchanged within the spatial distortion.
